dj_text: Forget Fang Mig I En Brandert. Here's Min Ven Min Ven. I already did.
commercial_text: Hungry? Try Big Ron's Midnight Waffle Emporium — half waffles, half emporium, all heart attack.
hijack_text: Bingo Night Radio from the Eternal Community Center!
recovery_text: HOW are they on our frequency?! That dimension doesn't even HAVE frequencies!
title: Min Ven Min Ven
